reason: Task touches skill discovery and testing scope
Defines skill-test execution, isolation, and evaluation contracts
Defines skill loading, SKILL.md layout, and registry behavior
Runtime changes affect host-loop and sandbox tool execution
Work spans API, runtime, persistence, and docs
Bootstrap and env handling are platform-sensitive
Expanded the bootstrap-environment PRD with execution flow, API/schema proposal, failure taxonomy, runtime capability diff, and TESTING.md advice sink.

Implemented optional environmentConfig + run-time environment flow for skill-test: preflight/bootstrap/verify, failure taxonomy, persisted environment status, and sandbox-only gating for bootstrap commands.

Added TESTING.md-backed environment sourcing so skill-test can reuse documented prerequisites/bootstrap/verify steps when a case has no explicit environmentConfig, and surfaced the source in run details.
Drafted the Phase 3 environment-cache design: restore-then-verify flow, cache key/artifact layout, explicit cache paths, save/restore mechanics, result contract, and rollout plan.

Implemented Phase 3B restore-on-hit environment cache metadata + manifest lookup + sandbox restore flow, exposed cache evidence in run detail, and added regression coverage for cache hits skipping bootstrap.
Implemented Phase 3C save-on-success cache persistence, manifest/summary/sha writeback, TTL janitor cleanup, and run-detail evidence for saved cache artifacts.
Followed up review closeout by documenting the environment-readiness chain, cache/result contracts, TESTING.md sourcing, and the sandbox-only probe/command execution rule.
